basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) Project Associate-1 (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website mnnit.ac.in. A total of 1 Project Associate-1 (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: upto 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Differently abled candidates

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech./ M.Tech/M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Food Technology, Biochemical/Process Engineering, Microbiology, Life Sciences, Agriculture Engineering, and any other related disciplines preferably with GATE/NET
qualification.details: B. Tech./ M.Tech/M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Food Technology, Biochemical/Process Engineering, Microbiology, Life Sciences, Agriculture Engineering, and any other related disciplines preferably with GATE/NET

salary_details.details: Project Associate-1/JRF: Rs. 31,000.00 per month (Consolidated) + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post at MNNIT Allahabad is 27 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate-1 (JRF) at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post in the MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-1 (JRF) at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000.00 per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Associate-1 (JRF) in MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Differently abled candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) posts at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their completed application form by post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications for Project Associate-1 (JRF) at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: Candidates should have B. Tech./ M.Tech/M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Food Technology, Biochemical/Process Engineering, Microbiology, Life Sciences, Agriculture Engineering, or related disciplines, preferably with GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Project Associate-1 (JRF) at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post at MNNIT Allahabad involves an Interview, which will be conducted in a Hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for Project Associate-1 (JRF) at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post is Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, specifically at Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad.

faq.question: Q10. When was the official notification released for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026 was released on 09 July 2026, inviting eligible candidates to apply.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Project Associate-1 (JRF) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Associate-1 (JRF) post at MNNIT Allahabad is 27 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach by this date.
